title: vitis sinoternata
intro: Vitis sinoternata is a species of grapevine native to China, belonging to the Vitaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and protecting against oxidative stress. Vitis sinoternata is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and has also been used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
